case_title: ANDRE PERSCH VS. FOREST HILL ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY PERSCH, ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT FOREST HILL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-25-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FOREST HILL ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FOREST HILL ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ANDRE PERSCH AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MARK WATTS, PRESIDENT OF THE FOREST HILL ASSOCIATION. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERSCH, ANDRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOREST HILL ASSOCIATION $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $395.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT FOREST HILL ASSOCIATION
